query:
ALTER TABLE cycle_counts 
  CHANGE COLUMN binCode bin VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  CHANGE COLUMN countedQty physicalQty DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  CHANGE COLUMN varianceQty variance DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  CHANGE COLUMN status resolved BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false;
